field.label: Behavioral Anomaly Detection
field.help: Enable machine learning-based detection of abnormal user and traffic behavior patterns

field.label: Beaconing Detection
field.help: Detect malware command and control (C2) beaconing patterns with regular intervals

field.label: Data Exfiltration Detection
field.help: Detect slow data exfiltration attempts and unusual data transfer patterns

field.label: Traffic Pattern Analysis
field.help: Analyze network traffic patterns to identify suspicious activities and attack signatures

field.label: User Behavior Profiling
field.help: Create behavioral profiles for users to detect account compromise and insider threats

field.label: Request Timing Analysis
field.help: Analyze request timing patterns to detect automated attacks and timing-based side channels

field.label: Data Entropy Analysis
field.help: Analyze data entropy to detect encrypted payloads and data hiding techniques

field.label: Automatic Baseline Learning
field.help: Automatically learn and update behavioral baselines based on observed normal traffic
